banner.info: 🧩 Our beads are 2.6mm mini fuse beads, produced by the same factory as Artkal. We use the MARD 221 color system — a wider palette, fully compatible with Artkal mini beads.

hero.badge: Free Online Tool · No Sign-up Required
hero.subtitle: Upload your image and instantly generate a custom bead pattern using the full Artkal 221 color palette. Get an exact bead count and order everything in one click. Compatible with Artkal and all 2.6mm mini fuse beads.
hero.libraryDesc: Kawaii, animals, food, seasonal — dozens of ready-to-use bead patterns, completely free.
hero.step1Desc: Drag & drop any photo — a pet, character, logo, or anything you love. JPG, PNG, and WebP supported.
hero.step2Desc: Instantly mapped to the Artkal 221 palette. Adjust grid size, colors, and fine details with live preview.
hero.step3Desc: Download your pattern as PDF, get an exact bead count, and add all required colors to your cart in one click.
hero.feat1Desc: Every color automatically matched to the official Artkal palette — no manual color picking needed.
hero.feat2Desc: Get a precise count for every color used. Know exactly how many beads to buy before you start.
hero.feat3Desc: Use brush, eraser, and eyedropper tools to refine your design pixel by pixel.
hero.feat4Desc: Download a print-ready pattern with color codes, grid lines, and a full color legend.
hero.feat5Desc: Add all required colors directly to your Yaya's Creative Studio cart — no manual searching.
hero.feat6Desc: Save multiple patterns and come back to them anytime. No account or sign-up required.
hero.ctaHeading: Ready to start your next bead project?
hero.ctaSubtext: Free to use · No sign-up · Works on any device

sidebar.modeHelp: clean = no dithering + stronger simplify · vivid = keep details · soft = gentle simplify
sidebar.paletteLimitHelp: 221 = most vivid · 50 = cleaner cartoon · 20 = very simplified
sidebar.simplifyHelp: Regions smaller than {{size}}px will be merged

palette.chooseSubtitle: You can only change this before uploading an image
palette.mardShop: Our shop beads use this palette
palette.artkalDesc: 173 colors · Use your existing Artkal beads
palette.artkalCompat: ✓ Same melting point · Mix & match freely
palette.artkalNote: Artkal C-Mini beads are produced using the MARD color system — fully compatible with our beads, same melting point.

replaceColor.title: 🎨 Choose a Replacement Color
replaceColor.subtitle: All beads of this color will be replaced instantly
replaceColor.hint: ★ = current color · Click any swatch to replace all matching beads
